title: Mercy (hospital ship)

The '''''Mercy''''' was a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]], appropriated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] while still under construction, and put in service by them as a [[Hospital ship/Legends|hospital ship]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Mercy'' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].<ref name="DF2" /> After its refit as a hospital ship, it could accommodate around 5000 patients, with 4250 [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tanks]]—although even that was far from sufficient to meet the casualties of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The ship was often crammed with injured and possibly dying Rebels. The ship's [[Ward 114]] was reserved for members of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] and [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|special forces]].<ref name="DF:RA" />

==History==
{{Quote|Look ma'am, this medical frigate just took on six thousand casualties from the Imperial attack on the planet Shackel. Everyone's got a friend on board.|[[Unnamed orderly (Mercy)|Orderly]]|<ref name="RAAD">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
The ship that would become ''Mercy'' was being constructed by the Galactic Empire; before it even was completed, it was captured by the Rebel Alliance and repurposed as a hospital ship sometime during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="DF:RA" />

The ''Mercy'' was present in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]] in the aftermath of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="TTaBS" />

[[File:KyleBacta_DFJK.jpg|thumb|left|[[Kyle Katarn]] healing in a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] onboard ''Mercy''.]]
[[Grenvil Taadus]] served on ''Mercy'' as a medical officer after the [[Bakura Incident]].<ref name="TTaBS" />

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], ''Mercy'' was orbiting a devastated planet, accompanied by an antiquated [[Battleship/Legends|Dreadnaught]], two [[Assault frigate]]s, a squadron of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[Gunship/Legends|Gun ships]] and other support vessels.<ref name="DF:RA" /> It was receiving six thousands casualties from the recent [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] [[Attack on Shackel|attack]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shackel]].<ref name="RAAD" /> Despite its size, it was overcrowded by wounded Rebel soldiers. Unable to accommodate all, they had to stay in the corridors, on makeshift beds, and its crew resolved to antiquated medicine because of the lack of adequate Bacta tanks.<ref name="DF:RA" />

[[Kyle Katarn]], having [[Mission to Nar Shaddaa (5 ABY)|sustained]] a serious injury on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] was healed in [[Bacta tank 23|Tank 23]] located in Bacta [[Ward 114]], enjoying high priority treatment thanks to his status in the [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|SpecOps]], despite the urgent situation. After his recovery, Kyle and [[Jan Ors]] went on to [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] to find the map to the [[Valley of the Jedi]].<ref name="DF:RA" />

The ship was part of the fleet stationed at [[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]] when a damaged [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] entered the system with a convoy of transports, and was defeated by the Rebel [[Battleship/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[New Hope]]''.<ref name="DF:JK" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Mercy'' was first mentioned in ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' as a medical frigate.<ref name="TTaBS" /> A Nebulon-B medical frigate later appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'',<ref name="DF2" /> which was identified as the ''Mercy'' in the novel ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''. However, the novel incorrectly described the ship to be more than two kilometers long,<ref name="DF:RA" /> in contradiction with the specifications of the Nebulon-B frigate.<ref name="NEGTVV">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>
